name: writing
description: Writing pack: strip AI tells from drafts before publishing. stop-ai-slop-jp (Japanese) and stop-ai-slop-en (English) catch predictable AI phrasing, false agency, propositional headings, uniform rhythm, and symbol artifacts. Role-agnostic. Derived from hardikpandya/stop-slop and iKora128/stop-ai-slop-jp (MIT).
